/home/user12/tools/avr8/bin/avr-gcc -mmcu=atmega128a -g -flto -fuse-linker-plugin -lm -Wl,-Map=/home/user12/workspace_semicon/avr/atmega128a/build/atmega128a.map,--cref -Wl,--gc-sections -Xlinker -print-memory-usage CMakeFiles/atmega128a.elf.dir/main.c.obj CMakeFiles/atmega128a.elf.dir/src/ap/ap.c.obj CMakeFiles/atmega128a.elf.dir/src/ap/ap_led.c.obj CMakeFiles/atmega128a.elf.dir/src/driver/button.c.obj CMakeFiles/atmega128a.elf.dir/src/driver/led.c.obj CMakeFiles/atmega128a.elf.dir/src/driver/main_motor.c.obj CMakeFiles/atmega128a.elf.dir/src/driver/sub_motor.c.obj -o atmega128a.elf
